content: pointer-events:none on a full-viewport overlay container lets clicks fall through to host page; pointer-events:auto must be set explicitly on each interactive child (tooltip/button) since none on a parent disables interaction for all descendants unless overridden. z-index must be high enough to render above host UI without relying on host's own stacking context (a host element with its own z-index/transform can create a new stacking context that traps the overlay below it).
